---
title: "Bad Nicknames"
subtitle: "15,262 posts where this was the primary topic."
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  h1 { border-bottom-color: #8B1E3F !important; }
</style>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [5, 6, 160, 864, 1379, 1089, 1879, 939, 293, 458, 1239, 1641, 21, 585, 1755, 2003, 692, 254],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#8B1E3F" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>complete total</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>total endorsement</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>joe biden</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>second amendment</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>siege second</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>always siege</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>let down</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>congressional district</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>crooked joe</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>grow economy</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>secure border</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>will never</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#8B1E3F'>american energy</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 28, 2024  01:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112691761566908678" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112691761566908678" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 30, 2024  16:40</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112185629286581430" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112185629286581430" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 24, 2023  03:35</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">“He (Crooked Joe Biden) can’t lift his feet out of the grass…”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110942496148496627" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110942496148496627" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 02, 2024  00:08</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden is the most incompetent President we have ever had…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112023184250460958" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112023184250460958" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2024  00:30</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN AND LYIN’ KAMALA HARRIS ARE A GREAT EMBARRASSMENT TO AMERICA — THERE HAS NEVER BEEN A TIME LIKE THIS!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112844304922148061" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112844304922148061" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 12, 2024  00:24</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe has a case of Trump Derangement Syndrome!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112770671043394140" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112770671043394140" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 09, 2024  18:14</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden, the WORST President in the History of the United States…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112412490433070131" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112412490433070131" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 25, 2023  17:55</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Joe Biden is a totally compromised President…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110606137924506263" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110606137924506263" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 11, 2023  00:15</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111213497544907712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111213497544907712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 02, 2024  02:59</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN IS THE WORST PRESIDENT IN THE HISTORY OF THE UNITED STATES, BY FAR!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112714657915032905" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112714657915032905" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 30, 2023  16:51</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden is a Manchurian Candidate!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110979598922358999" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110979598922358999" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2023  01:03</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN HAS BETRAYED YOU…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110607822932680587" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110607822932680587" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 11, 2024  17:00</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden is the worst, most incompetent, and most corrupt president in the history of our Country. But it’s very important to understand, the problem is not just Joe Biden—it’s every single elected Democrat in the House and Senate…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112253653767967446" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112253653767967446" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 26, 2024  10:25</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden’s “Handlers” are loudly and profusely complaining that there will be no Fact Checkers during the Debate on Thursday. Actually, that is just DISINFORMATION - They could not be happier, because there is nobody that’s as loose with the TRUTH as Crooked Joe. From the 51 Fake Intelligence Agents, to Russia, Russia, Russia, to the Fake “Suckers and Losers Story” he created about our beloved Military, to cheating in College and saying he was first in his Law School Class when he was actually LAST, to claiming he marched for Civil Rights, drove trucks, and has a 6.2 Handicap (He can’t hit the Golf Ball 10 yards, but that’s a minor detail!), and so many more falsehoods, the man is a walking LYING MACHINE, and a Fact Checker’s DREAM. Maybe we should call him “Lyin’ Joe” in addition to Crooked?</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112682436553637669" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112682436553637669" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 17, 2023  20:57</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I think that Crooked Joe Biden is not only dumb and incompetent, I believe he has gone MAD, a stark raving Lunatic…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110906954785607088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110906954785607088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 01, 2023  04:26</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden is the most incompetent President in history, and he’s the most corrupt President in history…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110987994601925675" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110987994601925675" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 11, 2023  22:11</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN is NOT too OLD, he is too INCOMPETENT!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111048806072729265" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111048806072729265" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 18, 2024  13:13</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Can you imagine Adam Shifty Schiff talking about me “EVADING JUSTICE,” WHEN HE IS THE MOST OUTRAGEOUSLY CROOKED POLITICIAN OUT THERE, WITH THE POSSIBLE EXCEPTION OF CROOKED JOE BIDEN, THE WORST PRESIDENT, BY FAR, IN THE HISTORY OF THE UNITED STATES???</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112116864488315820" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112116864488315820" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 13, 2020  19:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @ErinMPerrine: #BarelyThereBiden has some shady folks on his VP list  Warren — lied about her heritage Rice — lied about Russian collusion Harris — lied about Kavanaugh   They’ll fit right into the Biden campaign 👍🏻 https://t.co/6SkC32a996&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1271770808583696384" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1271770808583696384" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 08, 2024  02:16</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe is making his way to the Chamber. Very disrespectful to some. Not good!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112057661446029465" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112057661446029465" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 16, 2024  03:09</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN IS THE WEAKEST, MOST INCOMPETENT, AND MOST DISHONEST PRESIDENT IN THE HISTORY OF THE UNITED STATES BUT, MOST IMPORTANTLY, HE IS THE WORST PRESIDENT OUR COUNTRY HAS EVER SEEN OR KNOWN. HOPEFULLY, THERE WILL NEVER BE ANOTHER ONE LIKE HIM. HE IS A THREAT TO DEMOCRACY!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112448568528065509" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112448568528065509" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 19, 2020  02:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Corrupt politician Joe Biden makes Crooked Hillary look like an amateur!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1317891781648773121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1317891781648773121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 18, 2020  23:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Joe Biden is a corrupt politician</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1317852810302558208" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1317852810302558208" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 07, 2023  02:16</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden does the absolute opposite of what should be done to save our Country. He doesn’t have a clue!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111191325444670151" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111191325444670151" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 15, 2024  20:07</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">SINCE CROOKED JOE BIDEN TOOK OFFICE….</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112446906592389378" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112446906592389378" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2023  10:22</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpWow! “Crooked Joe Biden was on dozen’s of calls with Hunter’s Business Associates. He lied, said he didn’t know anything about his son’s business. Demanded the Ukrainian prosecutor be fired, immediately.” Laura Ingraham, FoxNews. “This is AMAZINGLY CORRUPT BEHAVIOR,” Mollie Hemingway. This is really bad news for Biden, which means I will probably be Indicted again, soon, in order to kill the News Cycle!!! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110813864166331733" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110813864166331733" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 22, 2023  15:35</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I never thought I would say that as the leading political opponent of Crooked Joe Biden…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110758469760170829" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110758469760170829" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 21, 2024  21:21</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN IS THE WORST PRESIDENT, BY FAR, IN THE HISTORY OF OUR COUNTRY. MAGA2024!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112135771816833107" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112135771816833107" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 15, 2019  23:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hunter Biden was really bad on @GMA. Now Sleepy Joe has real problems! Reminds me of Crooked Hillary and her 33</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1184125314147983361" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1184125314147983361" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 14, 2024  01:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Crooked Joe Biden is the most INCOMPETENT president in the history of our country, he is the most CORRUPT president in the history of our country, and he is the WORST president, by far—in the history of our country!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112266881437412678" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112266881437412678" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 17, 2016  05:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crazy @ megynkelly supposedly had lyin&#x27; Ted Cruz on her show last night. Ted is desperate and his lying is getting worse. Ted can&#x27;t win!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_710409594204524544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/710409594204524544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 10, 2023  12:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">I think that Crooked Joe Biden is not only dumb and incompetent, I believe he has gone MAD, a stark raving Lunatic, with his HORRIBLE AND COUNTRY THREATENING ENVIRONMENTAL, OPEN BORDERS, &amp;amp; DOJ/FBI WEAPONIZATION POLICIES. HE IS A MENTAL CATASTROPHE THAT IS LEADING OUR COUNTRY TO HELL!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110865224814637476" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110865224814637476" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 08, 2024  04:25</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN IS ON THE RUN FROM HIS RECORD—AND LYING LIKE CRAZY TO TRY AND ESCAPE ACCOUNTABILITY FOR THE HORRIFIC DEVASTATION HE AND HIS PARTY HAVE CREATED!https://DonaldJTrump.com</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112058165637365021" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112058165637365021" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 15, 2024  12:48</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Kamala Harris wants NOTHING TO DO WITH CROOKED JOE BIDEN. They are throwing him out on the Monday Night Stage, known as Death Valley. He now HATES Obama and Crazy Nancy more than he hates me! He is an angry man, as he should be. They stole the Presidency from him — “It was a Coup!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112966113550470036" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112966113550470036" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 31, 2023  23:39</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Wow! “Crooked Joe Biden was on dozen’s of calls with Hunter’s Business Associates. He lied, said he didn’t know anything about his son’s business. Demanded the Ukrainian prosecutor be fired, immediately.” Laura Ingraham, FoxNews. “This is AMAZINGLY CORRUPT BEHAVIOR,” Mollie Hemingway. This is really bad news for Biden, which means I will probably be Indicted again, soon, in order to kill the News Cycle!!! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_110811335581113974" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/110811335581113974" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 22, 2024  02:52</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">CROOKED JOE BIDEN’S AMERICA…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112137072935642665" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112137072935642665" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2020  21:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Shifty Adam Schiff is a CORRUPT POLITICIAN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1221422761597394944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1221422761597394944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 02, 2016  05:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Washington Post calls out # CrookedHillary for what she REALLY is. A PATHOLOGICAL LIAR! Watch that nose grow!pic.twitter.com/FsrUGByuuD&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_760420894271471620" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/760420894271471620" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 29, 2016  19:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Amazing that Ted Cruz can&#x27;t even get a Senator like @ BenSasse</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_693243553271713792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/693243553271713792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jun 27, 2016  08:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crooked Hillary is wheeling out one of the least productive senators in the U.S. Senate</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_747415955400196096" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/747415955400196096" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
